headline.zh-CN: 后台曲目救援操作不再强制填写原因
headline.en: Admin track rescue actions no longer require a reason

summary.zh-CN: 管理后台的曲目救援操作现在可以直接执行，无需为强制状态、重分配、重开、归档、恢复或删除额外填写原因。账号治理类操作仍会保留必填原因。
summary.en: Admin track rescue actions can now run without an extra reason for force status, reassignment, reopen, archive, restore, or delete operations. Account governance actions still keep their required reason field.

title.zh-CN: 曲目工作流操作的原因改为选填
title.en: Track workflow action reasons are now optional

description.zh-CN: 曲目救援区的原因输入框已标记为选填；留空时系统不再自动写入默认文案，审计记录会保留为空原因。
description.en: The reason field in the track rescue area is now marked optional. Leaving it blank no longer inserts default copy, and audit entries keep the reason empty.
